## Release impact

This repo uses Release Please + conventional commits.
When this PR is squash-merged, please use a squash title like one of these:

- `fix: preserve task IDs during normalization`
- `feat: add archive_done action`
- `feat!: change TODO.md format`

Versioning rules:

- `fix:` = patch release
- `feat:` = minor release
- `feat!:` or `BREAKING CHANGE:` = major release
- `docs:`, `chore:`, `test:` = usually no release

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated tests or verified existing tests still cover this change
- [ ] I ran `npm test`
- [ ] I considered whether this should be a `fix`, `feat`, or breaking change
- [ ] I will use an appropriate squash merge title
